meaning: adj.散布性的,扩及的,普及的
examples: The effects of diffusive angle on flow rate loss are also investigated.
The leaf area increased 5 and 3 fold in the closed and diffusive conditions, respectively.
Effective measures should be taken to prevent brain injury in training especially diffusive brain injury.
But even for solar, the vicissitudes of the sun (which vary by season and location) and the diffusive nature of solar power limit its potential.
